title: The place
body:
Catch 'Em All on The Place!
The Place is a small, community-driven Minecraft server built around the incredible Cobblemon mod! Explore a sprawling world, capture over 500 unique Cobblemon, and train them to become the ultimate battler.

What to expect:

Focus on Cobblemon: This server is built for Cobblemon trainers! Catch, train, battle, and trade your Cobblemon with friends.
Friendly Community: Our server is a welcoming space for players of all experience levels.
Vanilla+ Additions: We have a few quality-of-life mods to enhance your Cobblemon journey without straying too far from the vanilla experience.
Active Staff: Our dedicated staff is here to help you with any questions and ensure a fun and fair environment for everyone.
Is The Place for you?

If you love Pokemon and want to experience it in a new way within Minecraft, then The Place is the perfect server for you! Join our friendly community and embark on your Cobblemon catching adventure today!

Server IP: 104.194.9.117:25565 

Discord: https://discord.gg/CbQGN8zqd4
We hope to see you on The Place!
